summary: Successfully tested achievement icons and categories system update. Backend returns 25 achievements with correct icon keys and category assignments. Frontend renders category-colored icons, progress bars, and completed checkmarks. View All modal works with sorting. New 'favorites' category properly split from social category.

minor_notes.note: Streaks category defined in constants but no achievements implemented yet
minor_notes.impact: No functional impact, ready for future streak achievements

minor_notes.note: Progress bars may not show category colors when achievement progress is low
minor_notes.impact: Visual consistency issue for low-progress achievements

passed_tests: ✅ All 6 implemented categories present (predictions, accuracy, favorites, social, level, weekly)

✅ Correct icon keys by category: predictions (crosshair, brain, target), accuracy (badge_check, medal, gem, percent, gauge, shield_check), level (star, trophy, crown, sparkles), favorites (heart, heart_handshake, shield_heart), social (user_plus, users_round, network), weekly (swords)
✅ New 'favorites' category successfully split from social (3 achievements each)
✅ Profile page achievements section renders with category-colored icon backgrounds
✅ View All modal displays all 25 achievements correctly
✅ Achievement badge SVG icons render correctly
